name: IdsEdwExprncCatDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH CTE AS (SELECT E.EXPRNC_CAT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) END AS SRC_SYS_CD, E.EXPRNC_CAT_CD, E.EXPRNC_CAT_DESC, E.USER_ID, E.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) END AS FUND_CAT_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK')) END AS FUND_CAT_DESC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.EXPRNC_CAT E LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON E.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON E.EXPRNC_CAT_FUND_CAT_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE E.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) SELECT EXPRNC_CAT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, EXPRNC_CAT_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, EXPRNC_CAT_DESC, FUND_CAT_CD, FUND_CAT_DESC, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM CTE

Annotations:
Job name: IdsEdwExprncCatDExtr


Job Extract data from IDS table and apply Fkey and Code denormalization, create a load ready file.
Read data from source table EXPRNC_CAT
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys:
EXPRNC_CAT_FUND_CAT_CD_SK
Reference Code Mapping Data for Code SK lookups
Write EXPRNC_CAT_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
